Platform Engineering at Scale

Platform teams create leverage — but only when the organisational design matches the technology model. Most platform programmes get one right and ignore the other....

What Enterprise Architecture Actually Is

The IT/OT Boundary

Selected work

All projects →
01

Technology Platforms, Plains

Platform strategy and infrastructure modernisation for large-scale energy operations across North America. Evolving complex technology ecosystems while maintaining operational reliability at the IT/OT boundary.

2023 — present
Calgary, AB 02

Enterprise Architecture, WestJet

Built and led enterprise architecture practice for a major airline — establishing governance, developing long-term modernisation roadmaps, and aligning technology investment with operational priorities across four years of significant organisational change.

2018 — 2022
Calgary, AB 03

Technology Transformation, UBC

Director of Enterprise Architecture for one of Canada's largest universities — aligning technology investment with institutional strategy across a diverse ecosystem of research, academic, and administrative systems.

2011 — 2018
Vancouver, BC 04

Digital Infrastructure, Cardiff University

Early enterprise architecture and digital transformation for a major UK research university, including participation in national programmes on service-oriented infrastructure for higher education.

2005 — 2011
Cardiff, UK

Elsewhere

Geography & Modelling Wayward House Long-form writing on geography, spatial modelling, and computational science. Home Lab Sub Haus Open infrastructure, home lab experiments, and technology tinkering.
